---
title: "conCultuR overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{conCultuR overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

`conCultuR` is a measurement framework for conservation culturomics. See the focused vignettes for the main workflows:

- getting started
- live data workflow
- attention gap case study
- campaign diagnostics
- ethics and interpretation
